scenes.caption: What if I told you Canada's largest telecom is trading like it's going bankrupt?
BCE - 145 years old, $32.8B market cap, 10M+ subscribers
Trading at just 5.3x P/E - 52% discount to sector
Bell operates 4 business segments with duopoly wireless position
Bull case: Mean reversion, rate cuts, defensive moat
Bear case: High payout ratio, debt load, cord-cutting
Bottom line: Asymmetric bet for patient income investors
